headline: Intelligence Oversight Committee Established After 12 Years
context: Parliament established Intelligence and Security Committee in January 2026 ending 12-year campaign for civilian oversight.

cards.big: Parliament creates intelligence oversight committee after 12-year campaign
cards.sub: 7-member committee reviews operations budgets and conduct of 4 agencies

cards.big: Committee covers Special Branch MEIO NCIA and military intelligence
cards.sub: Combined budget of RM1.8 billion previously exempt from parliamentary scrutiny

cards.big: 5 MPs and 2 retired judges appointed for 3-year terms
cards.sub: Opposition holds 2 of 5 parliamentary seats ensuring bipartisan review

cards.big: Committee can access classified materials but cannot compel testimony
cards.sub: Critics say limitation makes committee advisory not truly accountable

cards.big: Intelligence oversight tests whether parliamentary review has real access or just appearance
Intelligence oversight committee took 12 years to establish. Accountability delayed is accountability diminished.
